_comment: GWAS Study Test Cases - Study metadata from GWAS Catalog
_note: GWAS studies provide metadata about published GWAS with publication info, traits, sample descriptions

custom_tests.name: Check publication metadata
custom_tests.description: Verify study has publication date, PubMed ID, and author information

custom_tests.name: Check disease/trait mappings
custom_tests.description: Verify study has disease trait and mapped EFO traits

custom_tests.name: Check association count field
custom_tests.description: Verify association_count field is present and valid

custom_tests.name: Check disease trait text search
custom_tests.description: Search for studies by disease trait (e.g., 'diabetes', 'breast cancer')

custom_tests.name: Check EFO trait cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify studies have xrefs to EFO trait ontology
